title: Junior Business Development Manager at Atul Projects

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Atul Projects
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Business Development Manager looking for your next big career move? Atul Projects in Jodhpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Atul Projects:
Atul Projects is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Atul Projects!
